Makefile:
TARGET = $(EJ)main
EJ= ./dist/
BUILD= build/
SRC= ./src/
INC= ./include/
CFLAGS= -g -I$(INC)

OBJS= $(BUILD)Mano.o \
      $(BUILD)Carta.o \
      $(BUILD)main.o

$(TARGET): $(OBJS)
	mkdir -p $(EJ)
	g++ $(CFLAGS) $(OBJS) -o $(TARGET)

$(BUILD)%.o : $(SRC)%.cpp
	mkdir -p $(BUILD)
	g++ $(CFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

.PHONY: clean
clean:
	rm -rf $(BUILD) $(EJ)
